settings.heading:
5,000 Years of Wisdom.
One Trusted Brand.
settings.subheading: Hindrishi Ayurveda was born from a deep belief that India's ancient healing knowledge, when combined with modern quality standards, can transform everyday wellness for millions of Indian families.

settings.heading: Rooted in Tradition, Crafted for Today
settings.description:
We started Hindrishi Ayurveda because we saw a gap. The market was flooded with products that claimed to be Ayurvedic but contained cheap fillers, undisclosed additives, and questionable sourcing. We decided to do it differently.

Every Hindrishi product begins with a classical Ayurvedic formulation, is manufactured in our GMP-certified facility, undergoes third-party lab testing for purity and heavy metals, and carries FSSAI licensing. We don't cut corners — because your health deserves better.

settings.title: The Vision Takes Root
settings.description: Hindrishi Ayurveda was founded on a belief that India's ancient healing tradition, combined with modern quality standards, could genuinely improve everyday lives across the country.

settings.title: GMP Certification Achieved
settings.description: We invested in a fully GMP-certified manufacturing facility — ensuring every product meets pharmaceutical-grade production standards before a single bottle leaves our premises.

settings.title: First Formulas Launched
settings.description: Our flagship Liv-Revive Liver Syrup and Kidney Wellness formulas launched — each validated through rigorous third-party lab testing and rooted in classical Ayurvedic texts.

settings.title: 10,000 Families Served
settings.description: Word spread naturally. Our commitment to authentic ingredients and transparent formulations resonated with families who were tired of synthetic supplements and empty marketing claims.

settings.title: 40,000+ Families Trust Hindrishi
settings.description: Today, over 40,000 families across India rely on us for their daily wellness. We ship to every pin code in India and remain committed to the same principles we started with — purity, authenticity, and trust.

settings.heading: How Hindrishi Began
settings.subheading: From a single vision to 40,000+ trusted families across India

settings.title: Authenticity First
settings.description: Every formula is rooted in classical Ayurvedic texts. We don't create trendy supplements — we carry forward a healing tradition that has served humanity for millennia.

settings.title: Science-Backed Quality
settings.description: Ancient wisdom deserves modern validation. Every batch is lab tested for purity, potency, and safety before it reaches your home. No compromises, ever.

settings.title: Radical Transparency
settings.description: We tell you exactly what's in every product, where it comes from, and how it's made. No hidden ingredients, no vague 'proprietary blends'.

settings.title: Proudly Made in India
settings.description: Every product is formulated and manufactured in India, for India. We understand Indian lifestyles and body types better than any imported supplement can.

settings.title: People Over Profit
settings.description: Effective Ayurvedic wellness should not be a luxury. Our pricing reflects our commitment to keeping quality accessible to every Indian family.

settings.title: Ethical & Sustainable
settings.description: We source herbs from sustainable farms, use no animal-derived ingredients, and never test on animals. Our wellness mission extends to the planet.

settings.heading: What We Stand For
settings.subheading: The principles that guide every product we make and every decision we take

settings.title: Pehli baar kisi product ne itni jaldi relief diya
settings.review: I was feeling very heavy after meals and had zero energy. Started taking this syrup and within 3 weeks, I'm feeling so much lighter. Digestion has improved a lot. Very happy with results.

settings.title: The self-care ritual I always needed
settings.review: Between work and family, I never took time for myself. This oil changed that. My skin is softer but honestly, the mental wellness benefit is even better. Thank you Hindrishi.

settings.title: Natural support that actually works
settings.review: Been using for 2 months consistently and my overall wellness has improved. No more that heavy, tired feeling. I appreciate that it's all natural herbs. Highly recommend.
